title: Merge the self-update-merge-config worktree into main
action: Feature self-update-merge-config is compounding-complete: 19 cells capped across EP1-EP6 (checksum publishing, version-compare, checksum-gated download, config merge, restart/health/rollback, public CLI verb + e2e smoke test), specs synced, learnings captured. Commit worktree's and main's trailing bookkeeping, then bee worktree merge --id herdr-gateway--wt--self-update-merge-config --cleanup. Run the full verify chain on the merged tree before commit since this touches real Rust source (self-update path: binary swap, checksum verify, config merge, restart) -- high risk, review carefully. Resolve any docs/backlog.md or docs/specs/*.md conflicts by keeping HEAD if the branch's side contributes nothing new there.

truths: Main's and the worktree's pre-merge bookkeeping-only dirty state is committed before the merge runs
git merge --no-ff wt/self-update-merge-config lands on main
The configured verify passes against the merged tree before the merge commit
No conflict markers remain in any merged file
--cleanup removes the worktree, deletes wt/self-update-merge-config, and drops its grant
prohibitions: Do not commit the merge on a red verify
Do not auto-resolve a docs/backlog.md or docs/specs/*.md conflict that carries real content from the branch -- only resolve when the branch side is empty/non-substantive

verify: git log --oneline -1 | grep -qi 'merge' && ! grep -rl '^<<<<<<<' --include='*' -- . 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -q . && node .bee/bin/bee.mjs worktree list --json | grep -qv self-update-merge-config && echo MERGE_OK

trace.outcome: Committed worktree's and main's trailing bookkeeping, merged wt/self-update-merge-config into main manually (git merge --no-ff --no-commit -> resolve -> verify -> commit) since the CLI's one-shot merge hit real conflicts. Resolved: 3 .bee/logs/*.jsonl modify/delete conflicts by deleting (following HEAD's prior untrack decision); docs/backlog.md by combining both sides and renumbering the branch's colliding new PBI-044 to PBI-045; critical-patterns.md by concatenating both sides' additive learnings. Full verify chain green (312 Rust tests, fmt, clippy, rename_contract, 79 web tests) before commit. Worktree removed, branch deleted, grant dropped. No duplicate PBI ids in the merged backlog.
trace.verify_command: git log --oneline -1 | grep -qi 'merge' && ! grep -rl '^<<<<<<<' --include='*' -- . 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -q . && node .bee/bin/bee.mjs worktree list --json | grep -qv self-update-merge-config && echo MERGE_OK
